subject: A dark-robed figure with long hair channels necromantic energy against a large, powerful humanoid who is engulfed in purple-pink magical flame
description: Two figures face off in a dramatic magical confrontation. On the left, a slender figure in dark, elaborate robes with long dark hair extends one arm forward, fingers outstretched, summoning or directing a surge of purple-black energy. The robes have ornate detailing and trail behind the figure. On the right, a large, powerfully built humanoid — dark skin, imposing stature — has both arms spread wide, their body engulfed and dissolving in swirling purple-pink magical fire. The right figure wears armored or decorative garments but is being consumed by the magical discharge. The background is abstract and purple-toned, suggesting an interior or dimensional space filled with chaotic magical energy. The composition emphasizes the polarity between the controlled, directing figure on the left and the disintegrating figure on the right.
foreground: Dark-robed figure extending arm with necromantic energy, second figure being consumed by flame
background: Abstract purple-toned space, chaotic magical energy
emotion: Controlled fury on the left figure; the extended arm and focused posture read as cold vengeance; the right figure's spread arms and engulfed form read as dissolution or anguish
